description: Style Note Lightweight and stylish, this T-shirt from adidas is comfortable and looks great. This T-shirt will keep you cool on a hot day and can be paired with denim shorts and canvas shoes for a sporty look on a day out. You can throw on a denim jacket if the temperature drops. Product Details White round neck T-shirt, engineered with Climacool technology, has short blue raglan sleeves with Adidas 3-Stripe running from the shoulder to the sleeve end, mesh paneling at the sides to wick away sweat and fluorescent printed branding on the chest centre Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach, iron or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on print or decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8& rdquo and chest 33") is wearing a size M
